title: License resolver + tiering (OA-field × JATS cross-check)
context: The corpus gate requires per-article license resolution that is robust, auditable, and impossible to bypass. PMC OA articles carry a license in the OA service's file-list field and a <license> element in the JATS XML; these can conflict. This task implements the resolver that reads both sources, cross-checks them, maps to an SPDX/CC id and a licenseTier, and flags any conflict as FLAGGED rather than silently picking one source. Depends on model-001 (record fields) and gate-002 (the authoritative tiering rules).
objective: Implement the license resolver that reads the OA-service license field and the JATS <license> element, cross-checks them, maps to SPDX/CC id + licenseTier per the gate-002 checklist, flags conflicts, and populates the license and licenseTier fields of the canonical record.
acceptanceCriteria: Resolver reads both the PMC OA file-list license field and the article JATS <license> element; cross-checks them and emits a single resolved license {id, url, source, permitsRedistribution, permitsDerivatives, commercialUse, snapshotRef}.
Any conflict between the OA-field and JATS sources results in a FLAG disposition with the conflict reason recorded; never a silent default-allow.

The licenseTier mapping follows gate-002 exactly: CC0/CC-BY/CC-BY-SA/CC-BY-ND → commercial or no-derivatives; CC-BY-NC family → non-commercial; no-CC-code/NIHMS/unverifiable → metadata-only or excluded.

License fixtures cover every license id in gate-002 (CC0, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, CC-BY-ND, CC-BY-NC, CC-BY-NC-SA, CC-BY-NC-ND, no-CC-code, NIHMS) plus negative/conflict cases; each must resolve to the correct tier in CI.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commit is DCO signed-off.
No API keys or secrets are committed; PMC/Europe PMC access uses official OA file lists and REST endpoints within rate limits.
resources: pmc-cancer-gate-002 (authoritative tiering rules the resolver implements)
PMC Open Access Subset file list format + license field documentation
SPDX license list; Creative Commons license identifiers
output: A merged PR adding the license resolver module (TypeScript/ESM) with fixtures for every license id and conflict case, CI-enforced passing tests, and documentation of the OA-field × JATS cross-check logic.
